chunks.text: we stopped at a small craft market in the center of town.
That street is known to all the local people.
At the entrance, there was a large picture.
“ Was this picture painted by your father?
“ No, it was not painted by my father.
It was painted by his friend,” the owner answered.
Inside, there were many simple tables.
“ They are made of wood from the local mountain,” the owner said with a smile.
At another table, there was fresh bread made from flour
and colorful jam made from fruit.
Tom is very interested in the history of this town.
I was surprised at how much he knows.
When we left the market and looked up
the top of the far mountain was covered with bright white snow.
